name: register_with_feedback_inverter
description: Code should include a register that updates on posedge clock with a combinational feedback path where the register input is an inverted copy of the register output through a single NOT gate, creating a toggle behavior on each clock edge.
snippet: always @(posedge clk) q <= ~q; assign data_out = q;

name: output_port_connected_to_register
description: Code should include an output port that is directly connected to a register output, where the register updates on clock edge and the port value should remain stable between simulation steps when clock is stable.
snippet: output reg data_out; always @(posedge clk) data_out <= q;

name: back_to_back_step_without_clock_toggle
description: Code should include consecutive simulation steps (.step() calls) without clock toggles between them, where an output port driven by a register should maintain a stable value but may incorrectly change due to evaluation order issues in the simulation engine.
snippet: dut.p_clock.set(true); dut.step(); auto a = dut.p_data_out.get<int>(); dut.step(); auto b = dut.p_data_out.get<int>();
